reviews.review_description:
One of the most amazing square in the world:
You have the opportunity to visit Piazza Navona in Rome right now with this app.
Educational! 😎

reviews.review_title: Great first chapter VR travel app 🥰👍
reviews.review_description:
First, thank you developers for this first chapter VR app, I enjoyed it very much. 
More please.  The presentation are educational and informative to view, the user interface are easy and simple to use.  Looking forward more chapters in new locations around the world.  I do recommend this VR app for everyone to enjoy.  Thank you.

developer_response.body: Hi bryanlo, thank you for your encouraging review, we’re glad that you enjoyed Piazza Navona! A new release with major bug fixes will be released shortly. Stay tuned!
